Our Story

Rooted in Nature,
Built for Scale

Madhur Honey Apiary was founded with a single mission — to bring the finest natural honey from Indian apiaries to tables and industries around the world. We work directly with thousands of beekeepers, ensuring ethical sourcing and premium quality in every batch.

🌿
Farm to ExportDirect sourcing from verified beekeepers — no middlemen, maximum freshness.
🔬
Lab Tested & CertifiedEvery batch is tested for purity, moisture content, and international compliance.
📦
Flexible Bulk PackagingAvailable in drums, IBC tanks, and custom packaging as per buyer requirements.
What We Offer

Our Honey Range

Multiple varietals and grades available for bulk export worldwide.

🌼
Multiflora Honey

Sourced from diverse wildflower regions, offering a rich, balanced flavour profile ideal for food processing and retail.

Most Popular
🌿
Mustard Honey

Harvested from mustard fields, this creamy honey is prized for its thick consistency and mild, buttery taste.

High Demand
🌲
Forest Honey

Dark, bold, and mineral-rich honey collected from deep forest flora — a premium specialty honey for gourmet markets.

Premium Grade
🌰
Lychee Honey

Light and aromatic honey from lychee orchards — popular in Asian and European specialty food markets.

Export Grade
🫙
Raw Unprocessed Honey

Minimally filtered, enzyme-rich honey preserved in its most natural form — ideal for health food brands.

Natural & Pure
✨
Custom Varietals

Need a specific varietal or blend? We work with buyers to source and supply bespoke honey grades tailored to your market.

On Request
Why Choose Us

Your Trusted
Export Partner

We don't just supply honey — we deliver reliability. From documentation and compliance to on-time shipments, we handle every step of the export process so you can focus on your business.


Start Your Order
🏅

Certified Quality

FSSAI, APEDA, HACCP, FDA Facility Registered, MSME & Import Export Licence — fully compliant for global trade.

🚢

Global Shipping

Reliable logistics partners for sea and air freight to 20+ countries.

📋

Full Documentation

We manage all export paperwork — certificates of origin, phytosanitary, lab reports.

🤝

Dedicated Support

A personal export manager for each client to ensure smooth communication.

How It Works

Simple Export Process

1
Inquiry & Quote

Share your requirements — varietal, quantity, packaging, and destination.

2
Sample Approval

We dispatch samples for your approval before committing to a bulk order.

3
Order Confirmation

Finalize terms, pricing, and packaging. We begin production immediately.

4
Shipment & Delivery

Your order is dispatched with full documentation and live tracking.
